report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v3: New commit today (5dad971) breaks 7-day deploy gap. 1,240 page.tsx on disk (+3), 591 published slugs (+2), 103 missing page.tsx stable. 147 TS errors flat. All 6 API routes code-healthy. Working tree now only 8 uncommitted files — massive cleanup shipped.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,240 page.tsx files on disk (+3 from last EOD v2: 1,237→1,240). 591 unique published slugs (+2 from 589).

103 published slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged. Gaps persist in: /compare/exchanges, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /learn/crypto-etfs-complete-guide, /learn/crypto-regulations-2026, /learn/memecoins-guide-2026 and 98 others.
147 TypeScript errors — STABLE across cycles. All non-blocking (learn page JSX + structured-data.examples.ts). No new regressions introduced.
Working tree dramatically cleaner: only 8 uncommitted files (2 modified skill files + 6 untracked: 2 social SVGs, 2 report JSONs). Down from 451 last cycle.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP 200 on degen0x.com. Code audit shows no new build-breaking patterns.
No page.tsx deletions or structural regressions detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present with proper caching: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), trending (300s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL), defi-yields (dynamic TTL).
All routes implement in-memory caching + Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate. No code changes to data layer this cycle.
Fallback coverage: 5/6 routes have stale-cache or static fallback. defi-yields still lacks stale fallback — minor gap, unchanged.
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key). 4/6 core routes depend on CoinGecko. Rate limit risk persists on cold-cache bursts.
7 supporting routes healthy in code: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe, og, admin.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live API latency or data freshness from sandbox.

sections.title: DevOps
items: NEW COMMIT TODAY: 5dad971 (Apr 1) — 'feat: admin page manager, learn guides, metadata fixes'. Breaks the 7-day deploy gap (last was 21aaf5b on Mar 25).
Working tree now only 8 uncommitted files (down from 451 last cycle). 2 modified tracked files (skill binaries), 6 untracked (social SVGs + reports).
Major batch committed: admin page manager, learn guides, metadata fixes — all now in HEAD ready for deploy.
DEPLOY STATUS: Commit exists but Vercel auto-deploy status unknown from sandbox. If Vercel is connected to repo, this should have triggered automatically.
Production build expected to succeed — TS errors remain non-blocking. No new build-breaking patterns in committed code.
No Vercel dashboard access from sandbox — cannot confirm deployment logs, error spikes, or build duration.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Major commit 5dad971 landed — admin page manager, learn guides, metadata fixes. Working tree cleaned from 451→8 uncommitted files.
DELTA FROM LAST EOD: +3 page.tsx (1,237→1,240), +2 published slugs (589→591), missing page.tsx stable at 103, TS errors flat at 147, uncommitted files 451→8 (massive cleanup).
CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs. P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback. P4 — 2 skill files uncommitted.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Status unchanged — 0 active items, 2 blocked items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx).
RESOLVED: P0 deploy gap from last cycle is RESOLVED. Commit 5dad971 landed today. Verify Vercel picked it up for auto-deploy.
